name: The A2 Milk Company Limited
analysis: A2M has reclaimed its short-term moving averages — the 9 has crossed up through the 26 and price is back above both. It is coming off a base, 38% below its one-year high, so there is room to run. RSI has turned up through its signal line. Trade idea: entry A$6.1100, stop A$5.0886, target A$7.5100 (1.37:1) — then trail it.
